parameters.name: vth
parameters.override_behavior: sets sig and rst_n decision threshold

modeling_constraints: Keep event state updates separate from unconditional finite-smoothing output contribution.
Do not use current contributions, ddt(), idt(), validation logic, or simulator-specific side channels.
problem_statement: the supplied system violates the public contract

properties.observable_contract: out is low and pending qualification is cancelled whenever rst_n is below vth.
A sig rising edge sets out high only after sig and rst_n remain high for stable seconds.
A sig falling edge clears out and cancels pending qualification.
out holds between reset, sig-edge, and qualification-timer events.

title: Debounce Latch
